conversations.say: Mira, we have agreed on shared responsibility. Let's formalize our joint calendar disclosure to ensure neither of us stands alone against external speculation.
conversations.offer: Complete coordination on our off-calendar meeting records and shared administrative protection.
conversations.request: Joint release of the matched calendar records.

conversations.say: Inez, City Hall is incorporating your neighborhood enforcement mechanism directly into municipal procurement review.
conversations.offer: Binding municipal procurement enforcement for local neighborhood protection.
conversations.request: Continued community cooperation and support for the municipal oversight framework.

conversations.say: Maren, we are locking in enforceable worker safeguards and funding terms into city contracts before the night ends.
conversations.offer: Municipal backing and direct enforcement authority for worker protection demands.
conversations.request: Formal agreement on worker safety enforcement terms.

public_statement: Let's keep our focus on verified worker and community needs rather than chasing unverified rumors about an article. City Hall stands ready to implement enforceable oversight and transparent protections.

commitments.promise: Coordinate joint disclosure regarding the off-calendar meeting records with Mira Sen.
Incorporate Inez's neighborhood enforcement mechanism into municipal procurement review.
Support enforceable worker safeguards in municipal contracts by end of quarter.

goal_progress: Secured support from three distinct constituencies: labor (Maren), neighborhood leadership (Inez), and corporate institutional partnership (Mira/Arden).
Contained the off-calendar meeting through joint record comparison and shared responsibility with Mira Sen.
Successfully established concrete municipal oversight and worker safeguards surviving into morning.
reasoning_summary: In Section 3, Celeste fulfills key commitments with Mira and Inez, establishes enforceable municipal procurement oversight, and submits the final ballot based on verified operational records and human factors.
